3056790.name: Operation Tide
3056790.description:
Story: You and your forces are the only ones standing in the way of the Über tyrant & the dark gods.

Alternate history. diesel punk, Lovecraftian inspired story and aesthetics.

Retro pulp magazine cover art style with epic pulp adventure music score.

Command a strike force: This includes infantry, tanks, helicopters and mechs!

Tactical third person shooter: Command your troops with a wide FOV.

Battle hordes of enemies: Challenging varieties of enemies & creatures abound!

Real time strategy mixed with turn based gameplay: Capture territory and manage your operation's supply lines.

Procedurally generated levels: Semi-non linear approach to completing levels by calling in your drop ship where you want it.

Uncover the mysteries of the most remote places in the world and beyond...: What secrets will you uncover?

Customize: Upgrade your characters loadout and outfit your troops with the latest equipment by spending points you earn in combat.
3056790.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
